card_description: Parmenides (c.515-450 BCE). Anti-time hypothesis; reality as unchanging Being
full_description:
Parmenides (c.515-450 BCE). Anti-time hypothesis; reality as unchanging Being.

**Category:** Top Term

**Frequency:** 200 mentions. First appears 1975-02-27.

**From the Exegesis:**
> I didn't see what had happened, but rather the fulfillment of time: its completion; so I remembered what was going to happen, not what had happened a long time ago.

PLOT ELEMENT for TO SCARE THE DEAD: Nicholas discovers that each of his brains (minds, hemispheres) is traveling at right angles to...
> Or -- did his other self (the Other) start out long ago, and is just now returning? Himself expressed as signal ("I shoot an arrow into the air"; by arrow read "half of myself") now returning, producing anamnesis, the shock of recognition. He is not starting on t[h]is trip; this trip is ending.

...
> What is expressed here is an extraordinary demonstration of the principles of conservation and symmetry (Hericlitus and Parmenides, plus our thermal laws). What was dispatched tiny and weak and frail and ignorant has returned with moral and spiritual authority, capable of working "magic," i.e. ca...

- (circa 1975-1976) Dick discusses the "economy of design" in a human life, suggesting that God places subtle, retrograde clues at early stages that only reveal their meaning at the end of the "solution." He uses the ...

- (circa 1975-1976) Dick synthesizes the "Magdeburg hemispheres" of his 1974 experience: the external transformation of Fullerton into Rome and the internal transformation of himself into an early Christian Essene. He...

**Related terms:** Advent (related), Anamnesis (related), Because (related), Bible (related), Brahman (related), Christ (related), Christian (related), Christianity (related)

Two pure (one heaven, one hell), then two mixed (the middle).

Ther[?]m : That which we call "illusion" or "not real" is simply that which is still incomplete. Not yet what it Is. There is alot of this. On all sides of us, and in us.

You see, they couldn't keep the universe vacant and closed until it was finished; where were we supposed to live until then? (Like a new exhibit at Disneyland which isn't opened until finished, until complete.) We're living in an in-process place, because there is no where else for us to go; this is the only exhibit.

The mirror opposite universe. It is not --repeat NOT-- another universe, but this one reflected. Thus as Parmenides said, Form Two is actually Form One (reflected, or seen in reverse, or seen backward or upside down or from outside). The Second Advent or God's Intervention, the prophecy, is more accurately the running down or wearing out of our kosmos, and the revitalization. Here is the biological model, rather than the mechanical model (vide Hussey). The egg: reborn, et al. Biological models. Orphic. What repels me about Marxism is its mechanistic quality.
